info.name: Zareen Murgh Shorba (Chicken Soup)
info.description: Tender murgh simmered with the blend of 23 shahi masale in a rich broth. A comforting Ramadan offering crafted to bring sukoon to Iftar.

info.name: Sheer Khurma
info.description: A festive milk pudding of vermicelli, dry fruits, and gentle mithaas, slow-cooked to a rich, creamy finish. A timeless Ramadan delicacy to conclude your Iftaar dawat the traditional way.

info.name: Murgh Patti Samosa
info.description: Crispy, Iranian-style patti samosa filled with murgh blended in 23 shahi masale, fried to golden perfection. A savoury peshkash, best enjoyed as a side dish during Iftar.

info.name: Gulrosh Soda Sharbat (Chandan Gulab Beverage)
info.description: Rose and chandan blended together into a fizzy, refreshing drink. A cool drink for a cooler Ramadan. (Energy: 120KCal, Carbohydrates: 30gm, Sodium: 7mg)

info.name: Matka Phirni
info.description: (100 gms) Dawat ko muqammal karein with this luscious, creamy rice pudding, garnished with khushboodaar kesar and almond slivers. (Energy: 417KCal, Carbohydrates: 82gm, Proteins: 8gm, Fats: 6gm, Sodium: 120mg)

info.name: Badshahi Iftari Sandooq with Junoon-e-Andhra Murgh Biryani - Iftar Box
info.description: This 7 course Ramadan Iftar daawat opens softly with succulent dates, followed by creamy Andhra Murgh Biryani and Murgh Shorba. Savour slow cooked Gosht Haleem, narm Murgh Koobedieh Kebabs, crisp Murgh Patti Samosas and soft Kulchas, all shaped with sabr. End sweetly with Sheer Kurma and the refreshing Gulrosh drink.

info.name: Badshahi Iftari Sandooq with Lazeez Bhuna Murgh Biryani - Iftar Box
